prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次约14315→16885→13735→13358→13167名，近三年呈前移趋势（位次数字减小），2025年基准约13167名，为近年最优水平；该校在云南省理科/物理类计划数：2021年28人、2022年28人、2024年29人、2025年32人、2026年36人，呈持续小幅扩招态势，2026年较2025年扩招约12.5%，扩招使竞争略有缓解，但位次数字仍受其他因素影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在79–83名区间，学校层次对考生吸引力保持平稳；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考等信号；2026年声誉仍偏负面，涉及学术不端事件通报；抖音热度总排名第77位，评价为“一般”，短视频曝光量中等偏低，未形成明显报考推高效应；合肥工业大学（本部）管理科学与工程获评A等级，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；宣城校区招生专业以工科为主，与校本部学科体系一脉相承，对理工类考生仍具一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为高热推荐或推荐），与该校工科定位匹配；云南省2026年高考总人数约37.79万，较2025年（约28.57万）大幅增长约32%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约22.93万人，竞争显著加剧；该校位于安徽省宣城市，属长三角区域，对西南省份考生有一定跨省吸引力；在云南省招生计划占比较小（约1%–2%），地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13167名、2026年扩招12.5%（使位次后移约988名）、本省物理类考生大幅增长约32%（加剧竞争）、学校声誉偏负面（降低报考热度）以及工科专业热度持续偏高等因素，经小幅修正后预测2026年最低位次约14355名，较2025年后移约1188名；区间13855–14855名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 14315 → 16885 → 13735 → 13358 → 13167, showing a forward trend in recent three years (decreasing ranking numbers). The 2025 baseline is about 13167, the best level in recent years. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan province for science/physics category: 28 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 29 in 2024, 32 in 2025, 36 in 2026, showing a continuous slight expansion trend. The 2026 plan expands by about 12.5% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition, but ranking numbers are still affected by other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked about 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 79–83 range in recent years. The university level maintains a stable attraction for candidates. In 2025, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors with no applicants. In 2026, reputation remains somewhat negative, involving reports of academic misconduct incidents. Douyin popularity ranks 77th overall, rated as 'average', with medium-low short video exposure, not forming a significant boost in applications. Hefei University of Technology (main campus) has Management Science and Engineering rated A level, the only A- or above discipline. The Xuancheng Campus offers majors mainly in engineering, consistent with the main campus's discipline system, still attracting science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, Computer Science, etc., continue to have high social popularity (all were high-recommendation or recommended in 2024), matching the university's engineering orientation. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Yunnan province in 2026 is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 285,700). Estimated physics category candidates are about 229,300 based on historical proportions, intensifying competition. The university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, part of the Yangtze River Delta region, attracting some cross-provincial candidates from southwestern provinces. The enrollment plan in Yunnan accounts for a small proportion (about 1%–2%), so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 13167, a 12.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 (shifting ranking back by about 988), a significant 32% increase in local physics category candidates (intensifying competition), a somewhat negative university reputation (reducing application enthusiasm), and sustained high popularity of engineering majors, after minor adjustments, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 14355, shifting back by about 1188 compared to 2025; range 13855–14855.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control (Xuancheng Campus)
- Mechanical Engineering (Xuancheng Campus)
- Software Engineering (Xuancheng Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Environmental Engineering (Xuancheng Campus)
- Food Nutrition and Health (Xuancheng Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Economics (Xuancheng Campus)
- Logistics Management (Digital Logistics) (Xuancheng Campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13855–14855, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<13855), you can focus on aiming for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control and Software Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>14855), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 3340 → 3317 → 3191 → 12842 → 3856; an abnormal gap occurred in 2024 (ranking plummeted to 12842), but recovered to 3856 in 2025. The normal range over the past four years is about 3191–3856, with 2025 baseline at 3856. The enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan for liberal arts/history category: 7 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 6 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and only 2 in 2026, a significant reduction of about 66.7% compared to 2025. This reduction intensifies competition, causing rankings to decrease (easier admission).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th in the Soft Science ranking, with stable reputation, still attractive to liberal arts students. In 2025, reputation was slightly negative (hot majors' admission scores plummeted), and in 2026, still slightly negative (academic misconduct reports). Douyin popularity is average, not significantly boosting application heat. Hefei University of Technology is strong in engineering, while its liberal arts majors (English, Network and New Media) are not its strengths, with no subject evaluation coverage, thus relatively limited appeal to liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: English/foreign language majors have average social popularity (2024), while Network and New Media, under the journalism and communication category, has clearly declining popularity. In 2026, Yunnan's total Gaokao candidates are about 377,900, with an estimated 148,600 history category candidates (based on historical proportion), a 32% increase from 2025 (112,400), intensifying competition. The university is located in Xuancheng, Anhui, in the Yangtze River Delta region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts students from southwestern provinces, but with few liberal arts majors and small enrollment numbers, regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 3856, a 66.7% enrollment reduction in 2026 (shifting ranking forward by about 1542), a 32% increase in local history category candidates (intensifying competition), and low popularity of liberal arts majors, after minor adjustments, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 2364, a forward shift of about 1492 from 2025; range: 1938–2790.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1938–2790, the university has only 2 liberal arts majors with very few spots (only 2), so it is recommended to aim for Network and New Media as Tier 1 and English as a safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit (<1938), focus on Network and New Media. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>2790), admission probability is low, so consider other universities as well.
